mapper.select:
SELECT p.phenotype_id AS phenotypeId, p.phenotype_name AS phenotypeName, p.source AS source, COUNT(DISTINCT pt.tcm_tar_id) AS geneCount FROM phenotypes p LEFT JOIN phenotype_target_rel pt ON p.phenotype_id = pt.phenotype_id
(p.phenotype_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR p.phenotype_id LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
GROUP BY p.phenotype_id, p.phenotype_name, p.source ORDER BY p.phenotype_id
SELECT id, phenotype_id AS phenotypeId, phenotype_name AS phenotypeName, source FROM phenotypes WHERE phenotype_id = #{phenotypeId}

SELECT COALESCE(t.type_of_gene, 'Unknown') AS geneType, COUNT(*) AS count FROM phenotype_target_rel pt INNER JOIN targets t ON pt.tcm_tar_id = t.tcm_tar_id WHERE pt.phenotype_id = #{phenotypeId} GROUP BY t.type_of_gene ORDER BY count DESC
